paper: Striving for Simplicity: The All Convolutional Net

data.preprocessing: GCN + ZCA whitening (Goodfellow et al. 2013, epsilon=0.1)

models.B_base: NIN variant: 5x5 + 1x1 conv per block before pool
models.C_base: Two 3x3 convs per block with max-pooling
models.A_strided: Model A with pool removed, preceding conv stride 2
models.B_strided: Model B with pool removed, preceding 1x1 conv stride 2
models.C_strided: Model C with pool removed, second 3x3 stride 2
models.A_convpool: Model A + 3x3 conv before each pool
models.B_convpool: Model B + 3x3 conv before each pool
models.C_convpool: Model C + 3x3 conv before each pool (3 total per block)
models.A_allcnn: Model A: pool replaced with 3x3 stride-2 conv
models.B_allcnn: Model B: pool replaced with 3x3 stride-2 conv
models.C_allcnn: All-CNN-C: pool replaced with 3x3 stride-2 conv (headline model)

classifier_head.description: D(0.5) -> Conv(3x3, 192) -> Conv(1x1, 192) -> Conv(1x1, nc) -> GlobalAvgPool

assumptions.detail: Architecture: Model C uses two 3x3 convs per block (replacing 5x5+1x1 of B with 3x3+3x3)
assumptions.evidence: Published implementations of All-CNN-C achieve ~9.1% consistent with two 3x3s

assumptions.detail: LR selection: probe 15 epochs on 5k subset, then full 350-epoch run
assumptions.evidence: Paper says gamma selected from {0.25, 0.1, 0.05, 0.01} per model

assumptions.detail: MaxPool padding=1 to maintain power-of-2 spatial dims (32->16->8)
assumptions.evidence: Standard CIFAR practice; ensures GAP works on 8x8 features

assumptions.detail: ImageNet excluded: not auto-downloadable, requires manual setup
assumptions.evidence: ImageNet requires registration at image-net.org, ~150GB; cannot fetch in container

assumptions.detail: pytorch version not explicitly stated in paper
3x CUDA GPU (24GB each) available, using cuda:0 per cell

deviations: ImageNet experiment OUT OF SCOPE (requires manual download, licensing)
LR selected via short probe rather than full grid search over all models simultaneously
